description: Execute V0.7-M6-C by generating a comparative synthesis of the protocol and extracting V0.8 carry-over candidates.
scope: Generate a final synthesis document (tasks/v0.7-m6-c-comparative-synthesis.md) summarizing the evidence-based assessments from M6-A and M6-B, comparing the V0.7 Unified Model with alternative non-intrusive schema injections, and formalizing the V0.8 implementation epics (state migration, legacy tooling removal, and review automation).
out_of_scope: Strictly NO implementation of the V0.8 candidates. NO active .agent-state/ physical migrations. NO codebase modification in src/. NO changing workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state models.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Attempting to implement any V0.8 roadmap targets.
Executing without an approved M6-C contract.
